title: The Devil Wears Prada 2" Eyes $66M US Opening
body:
The highly anticipated sequel to the 2006 hit film, 'The Devil Wears Prada', is poised to make a significant impact at the box office, with early tracking suggesting a substantial opening weekend haul of over $66 million in the United States. As the summer movie season approaches, this promising start has industry insiders abuzz with excitement, and for good reason. The original film, starring Anne Hathaway and Meryl Streep, was a critical and commercial success, grossing over $326 million worldwide, and its sequel is expected to capitalize on the enduring popularity of the first installment.

The summer movie season, which officially kicks off on May 1, is typically a crowded and competitive time for film releases, with numerous high-profile movies vying for audience attention. However, 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' appears to be well-positioned to stand out from the pack, thanks in part to its built-in fan base and the lingering appeal of its stylish and witty predecessor. The film's presales are reportedly double those of other recent releases, a strong indicator of the significant interest and anticipation surrounding its debut. This early momentum suggests that the sequel is on track to become one of the summer's biggest hits, and may even exceed the original film's impressive box office performance.

One key factor contributing to the sequel's strong prospects is the enduring popularity of the original film's themes and characters. 'The Devil Wears Prada' was more than just a stylish and entertaining movie – it was also a nuanced exploration of the complexities of female relationships, ambition, and identity. The film's portrayal of the demanding and ruthless fashion editor Miranda Priestly, played by Meryl Streep, became an instant cultural touchstone, and its influence can still be seen in many aspects of popular culture today. By leveraging this existing goodwill and fascination, the sequel is likely to attract both old and new fans, eager to revisit the world of Runway magazine and its formidable characters.

In addition to its built-in audience and cultural relevance, 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' also benefits from a well-timed release schedule. With the summer movie season set to kick off in early May, the film's debut will coincide with a period of peak audience demand for new and exciting cinematic experiences. As schools let out and vacation season begins, families and young adults will be looking for entertaining and engaging films to enjoy, and 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' is poised to meet this demand. With its stylish and sophisticated tone, the film is likely to appeal to a broad range of viewers, from fans of the original movie to those simply looking for a fun and glamorous summer blockbuster.

As the release date for 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' draws near, industry observers will be closely watching the film's performance, eager to see if it can live up to its promising early tracking. While there are always risks and uncertainties associated with movie releases, the sequel's strong presales and cultural relevance suggest that it has a solid foundation for success. With its talented cast, stylish visuals, and engaging storyline, 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' is well-positioned to become one of the summer's most talked-about and successful films, and its impact is likely to be felt throughout the entertainment industry.

Looking ahead to the summer movie season, it is clear that 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' will be a major player, with the potential to dominate the box office and captivate audiences around the world. As the film's release approaches, fans and industry insiders alike will be eagerly anticipating its debut, and the opportunity to revisit the glamorous and intriguing world of Runway magazine. With its strong early tracking and enduring cultural appeal, 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' is poised to make a significant impact on the film industry, and its success will likely be felt for months to come.
